tool.name: kerberos_tester
tool.description: Kerberos security testing for AS-REP roasting, Kerberoasting, and delegation abuse.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test for AS-REP roastable accounts (no preauth) - Identify Kerberoastable service accounts - Enumerate SPNs for Kerberoasting - Check for unconstrained/constrained delegation - Test Kerberos configuration security - Generate attack commands for exploitation

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action to perform: - test_asrep: Test for AS-REP roastable accounts - test_kerberoast: Test for Kerberoastable accounts - enumerate_spns: Enumerate service principal names - check_delegation: Check for delegation misconfigurations - check_preauth: Test if preauth is required - full_test: Run all Kerberos security tests

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target domain controller or domain name

parameter.name: username
parameter.description: Username for authenticated tests (user@domain or DOMAIN\\user)

parameter.name: users_file
parameter.description: File with usernames to test (one per line)

returns.description: Test results with vulnerable accounts and attack vectors

tool.examples:
# Test for AS-REP roastable accounts
test_asrep dc01.domain.local domain.local
# Kerberoast with credentials
test_kerberoast 10.0.0.1 user@domain.local password123
# Check delegation settings
check_delegation dc01.domain.local domain.local
# Full Kerberos security test
full_test dc01.domain.local domain.local
